name: vodmal
description: AI-powered plugins for development tools by Dmitry Vorobyev.

plugins.name: vdm
plugins.description: SDLC workflow plugins: docs-sync (documentation synchronization), learn (knowledge capture), changelog (project change tracking), crystal-* (multi-root workitem discipline gate — grow/bud/cut/cave/migrate with auto-scan + 4-tier status taxonomy + in-flight capture-reminder + orphan-sidetracks gate + batch legacy-doc migration + evidence discipline: Basis taxonomy, pre-action gate, live current-model section), intercom (central cross-agent/cross-session message store outside all repos, git-remote-identity routing + self-registering registry).

plugins.name: vdm-git
plugins.description: Git safety plugin: blocks commit/push until user confirms, ships `git-guard-prepare` helper for file-based commit hand-off, enforces commit message format, crystal-completion backup gate.
